task_completion.description: Verify that the dataset is loaded into a new workbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics Desktop interface shows a dataset (e.g., 'sample_order_lines' or 'sample_order_lines2023') loaded in the data panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that a calculated column named 'Order Size Tier' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data element named 'Order Size Tier' is visible in the data panel or within the calculation editor.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Donut Chart visualization is added to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Donut Chart is clearly visible on the main visualization canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Donut Chart is configured with 'Order Size Tier' and a count-based measure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visualization grammar/properties panel shows 'Order Size Tier' assigned to the Category/Color section and a count measure (e.g., Count, Number of Rows) assigned to the Size/Values section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved as 'Order_Size_Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window displays 'Order_Size_Analysis' or a save dialog shows this filename.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface with menus, panels, and canvas, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the visualization is genuinely rendered by the BI tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The donut chart appears within the Oracle Analytics workspace with interactive elements (like tooltips or selection handles), not as a static image opened in an image viewer.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the provided dataset columns.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data panel shows genuine columns from the dataset (e.g., Sales, Order ID) rather than manually typed dummy data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected workbook filename is 'Order_Size_Analysis' (or 'Order_Size_Analysis.dva'). The expected calculated column name is 'Order Size Tier'. The chart type must be a donut chart. Note: The agent may use 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' instead of 'sample_order_lines.xlsx' and the 'Sales' column instead of 'Revenue' due to environment discrepancies; these adaptations are correct and acceptable.
